compiled_state.title: Implement REBASE_HEAD filtering in pre-commit-review-gate.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add REBASE_HEAD detection after MERGE_HEAD block (~line 233) in plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-review-gate.sh. Mirror the MERGE_HEAD pattern: detect REBASE_HEAD via $(git rev-parse --git-dir)/REBASE_HEAD, read onto from rebase-merge/onto or rebase-apply/onto, read orig-head from rebase state dir (rebase-merge/orig-head or rebase-apply/orig-head), compute merge base, filter STAGED_FILES. Fail-open on missing onto/orig-head/merge-base.

Use git rev-parse --git-dir for per-worktree paths (at least 2 new occurrences in the REBASE_HEAD block).

## TDD Requirement
The 3 RED tests from task c876-2868 turn GREEN.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-review-gate.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] REBASE_HEAD detection in pre-commit-review-gate.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'REBASE_HEAD' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-review-gate.sh
- [ ] Uses git rev-parse --git-dir (at least 3 total occurrences, 2 existing + 1+ new)
  Verify: grep -c 'git rev-parse --git-dir' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-review-gate.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: ! grep -q 'pre-commit-review-gate.*\[test_review_gate_rebase' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Detection must check -f REBASE_HEAD (symmetric with MERGE_HEAD check). Then read orig-head from rebase-merge/orig-head (or rebase-apply/orig-head) to find the pre-rebase branch tip for merge-base. Two-file approach: REBASE_HEAD for detection, rebase-merge/orig-head for ancestor.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: RED tests now GREEN (18 passed, 0 failed) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: All AC verify commands passed ✓ AC2: REBASE_HEAD present, AC3: git rev-parse --git-dir 3+ occurrences, AC4: RED marker removed
